creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #17)
I spoke too soon. Updating mesa didn't do anything.

Additionally, an easier way to hang the graphics is to run a more graphically-intensive screensaver from xscreensaver for a "prolonged" period.

One of my incident machines does not use ZFS.

Going to see if base b51927b7b018d268c91b2127d82786caf68254de from bug 261707 makes a difference.
